name: Chill out Climbing Gym
addressFull: 15/25 Sukhumvit Road, Surasak, Si Racha District, Chon Buri 20110

pricing.dropIn: Planned day pass ฿380; planned student day pass ฿220
pricing.monthly: Planned monthly pass ฿2,100; planned student monthly pass ฿1,400
pricing.notes: Pre-opening prices published by the venue. The site says equipment rental will be available but gives no rental menu. All products remain provisional until the gym opens.

classes.levels: Venue says all levels and children's classes are planned.

history.notableEvents: Official site announces an autumn 2026 opening; Google Maps displays a planned opening date of 1 October 2026. Neither establishes that the venue has opened.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Anyone seeking a gym now: this venue is pre-opening and should not be published as operational.

comparison.differentiator: A planned Si Racha bouldering venue with cafe and workspace, outside the site's current Pattaya area taxonomy; not yet open or reviewable.

sources.label: Chill out Climbing Gym official website
Chill out Climbing Gym official Instagram

unverified: facilities wall dimensions and route count
facilities rope, top-rope or lead-climbing provision
